scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tinker/project-schema build && pnpm --filter @tinker/generation-contract build && pnpm --filter @tinker/rendering build && pnpm --filter @tinker/editor build && pnpm --filter @tinker/ai-edit-ui build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit && vite build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @tinker/project-schema build && pnpm --filter @tinker/generation-contract build && pnpm --filter @tinker/rendering build && pnpm --filter @tinker/editor build && pnpm --filter @tinker/ai-edit-ui build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
